self_report.reflection: Setting area(A)=area(B) collapses to c·x₂ = ∫₀^{x₂}(2x−3x³)dx = x₂²−(3/4)x₂⁴; combined with the on-curve condition c = 2x₂−3x₂³, this forces (9/4)x₂² = 1, hence x₂ = 2/3 and c = 4/3 − 8/9 = 4/9. The derivation is fully determined, so the asserted value matches uniquely.
self_report.notes: Direct algebraic derivation from the equal-area equation uniquely yields c = 4/9, matching the claim.
